title: Backend Developer Vacancy at AgroStar - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at AgroStar - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
AgroStar invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Backend Developer at our Srinagar location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About AgroStar:
AgroStar is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in AWS

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Referral bonus program
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Srinagar, Jammu & Kashmir, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with AgroStar!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
